HORIZONTAL_PUSH.description: Suitable for beginners with basic instruction. Free-weight variations require moderate coordination.

VERTICAL_PUSH.description: Requires shoulder mobility, core stability and overhead coordination.

HORIZONTAL_PULL.description: Generally beginner-friendly with emphasis on scapular control.

VERTICAL_PULL.description: Requires basic scapular control and full range of motion.

SQUAT.description: Requires proper bracing, mobility and movement mechanics.

HINGE.description: Hip hinge mechanics are commonly performed incorrectly. Neutral spine and proper bracing are essential.

LUNGE.description: Requires unilateral balance and lower-body coordination.

ELBOW_FLEXION.description: Simple isolation movement with minimal coordination requirements.

ELBOW_EXTENSION.description: Generally easy to learn while maintaining elbow control.

SHOULDER_ABDUCTION.description: Requires controlled shoulder movement without momentum.

ANTI_EXTENSION.description: Requires maintaining spinal position under tension.

ROTATION.description: Requires rotational control and trunk stability.

CARRY.description: Easy movement but requires posture awareness and grip endurance.
